name: samseg_long
description: SAMSEG longitudinal segmentation via niwrap: one script runs either mri_robust_template (BIDS T1w -> unbiased template) or run_samseg_long (template-space images -> longitudinal segmentation), selected by the TOOL argument. One call per participant; sessions auto-discovered. Supports local, docker, singularity, podman, or auto runner backends.

inputs.name: script_path
inputs.description: Path to the script to run (shipped inside the pipeline bundle).

inputs.name: tool
inputs.description: Which tool to run: mri_robust_template or run_samseg_long.

inputs.name: input_dir
inputs.description: Input root: BIDS dir for mri_robust_template; step-1 output dir for run_samseg_long.

inputs.name: participant_id
inputs.description: Participant label, with or without the sub- prefix.

inputs.name: runner
inputs.description: niwrap runner backend: local (default), docker, singularity, podman, or auto.

inputs.name: license
inputs.description: Path to FreeSurfer license.txt. Required for container runners (docker/singularity/podman).

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: Override container image (default: auto-resolved from niwrap metadata, currently freesurfer/freesurfer:7.4.1).
